rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §255.002 governs rates for political advertising and has no relation to homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 255.002. RATES FOR POLITICAL ADVERTISING. (a) The rate charged for political advertising by a radio or television station may not exceed:
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed change.
